shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -80 && test -d node_modules/next/dist/docs && echo NEXT_DOCS_PRESENT || true && rg -n \"unstable_noStore|dynamic =|revalidate|server timestamp\" node_modules/next/dist/docs 2>/dev/null | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- app/page.tsx app/server-timestamp.tsx app/layout.tsx tsconfig.json && git status --short'

/bin/bash -lc 'first=$(curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | sed -n '"'s/.*<time dateTime=\"\\(["'^"]*'"\\)\".*/\\1/p'); sleep 1; second="'$(curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | sed -n '"'s/.*<time dateTime=\"\\(["'^"]*'"\\)\".*/\\1/p'); printf 'first=%s\\nsecond=%s\\n' \""'$first" "$second"; test -n "$first" && test -n "$second" && test "$first" != "$second"'

/bin/bash -lc "git -C /home/user/workspace status --short 2>&1 || true; git -C /home/user/workspace diff --no-index /dev/null app/server-timestamp.tsx 2>/dev/null || true; pgrep -af 'next start|next-server' || true"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
